name: Introduction to Algebra
description: Build a strong foundation in algebraic concepts including variables, equations, and problem-solving strategies. Perfect for students beginning their math journey.

name: Creative Writing Fundamentals
description: Develop your writing skills through storytelling, poetry, and expressive writing exercises. Learn narrative structure and voice development.

name: Biology 101: Life Sciences
description: Explore the fascinating world of living organisms, from cells to ecosystems. Includes virtual lab experiences and interactive simulations.

name: World History: Ancient Civilizations
description: Journey through ancient Egypt, Greece, Rome, and beyond. Discover how early civilizations shaped our modern world.

name: Computer Science Basics
description: Introduction to programming concepts, computational thinking, and basic coding in Python. No prior experience required.

name: Art & Design Principles
description: Master the fundamentals of visual art including color theory, composition, and various artistic techniques and mediums.

name: Physical Education & Wellness
description: Comprehensive health and fitness curriculum covering exercise, nutrition, mental wellness, and healthy lifestyle habits.

name: Music Theory Essentials
description: Learn to read music, understand rhythm, melody, and harmony. Includes ear training exercises and composition basics.

name: Student Information System (SIS)
description: Comprehensive student data management including enrollment, demographics, transcripts, and academic records. Enterprise-grade security.

name: Gradebook Pro
description: Powerful grading and assessment platform with customizable rubrics, automatic grade calculation, and progress tracking.

name: Attendance Tracker
description: Streamlined attendance management with real-time tracking, automated notifications, and comprehensive reporting dashboards.

name: Parent Portal
description: Secure communication hub connecting parents with teachers. View grades, attendance, assignments, and school announcements.

name: Learning Management System
description: Full-featured LMS for course delivery, content management, assignments, quizzes, and student engagement tracking.

name: Assessment Builder
description: Create standardized tests, quizzes, and formative assessments with automatic scoring and detailed analytics.

name: Report Card Generator
description: Automated report card creation with customizable templates, standards-based grading, and multi-language support.

name: School Analytics Dashboard
description: Data visualization and insights platform for tracking school performance, student outcomes, and operational metrics.
